steps.title: Identify the slope of line t
steps.content: The equation $y = -\frac{1}{2}x + 14$ is in slope-intercept form. The slope is $m_t = -\frac{1}{2}$.

steps.title: Apply the perpendicular slopes rule
steps.content: For perpendicular lines, slopes are negative reciprocals. The slope of line s is:$$m_s = -\frac{1}{m_t} = -\frac{1}{-\frac{1}{2}} = 2$$This matches choice B — B is correct.
